markers: Embedded cytopathology case bank in src/CytopathologyService.js
Clinical criteria, specimen types, IHC panels, and management rules are data-driven in code
No standalone lecture or algorithm corpus found
Only static branding images found in public/ and src/logo.svg

summary.notes: This is a React application with migratable educational content embedded in a single service component rather than in separate content files.

recommendation: Stage the tutorial/case data by extracting it from src/CytopathologyService.js into a normalized content format before copying anything larger. Do not expect separate lecture or algorithm files from this repo.
